title: palicourea lasiorrhachis
intro: Palicourea lasiorrhachis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the velvet-leaf palicourea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Palicourea lasiorrhachis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are also dried and used in herbal remedies.
